description: The reviewer requests rigorous truncation error estimates for the finite matrix Galerkin approach, explicit tracking of constants in the MOW theorem, and explicit property tau use. These aspects are not present in the current experimental data. To address these, we would need: (1) a full derivation of an a-posteriori truncation bound for the specific collocation/Galerkin setup used (with the explicit expansion to infinity error controlled, such as in Duarte–Koch 2020); (2) code-level constant tracking for every step in the MOW-based arguments (with computer assist to extract the numerical values); (3) explicit certification and propagation of property tau at each step. This would require significant additional symbolic and numerical computation not yet performed.
